mods.name: Lysdexic's Fast Foliage Harvest
mods.author: TheLysdexicOne
mods.description: By default there is a 0.5 second delay between collecting foliage by hand. This mod lessens that delay to 0.1 seconds.

mods.name: Lysdexic's Faster Skinning
mods.author: TheLysdexicOne
mods.description: Adds a skinning modifier to all knives to increase skinning speed by 500%.

mods.name: Lysdexic's Faster Smelting
mods.author: TheLysdexicOne
mods.description: In the building talent tree, there is the talent 'Stoking the Flames'. This talent adds an alteration to all furnaces crafted. This mod changes those alteration values from 10 -> 50 and 15 -> 100. This ensures furnaces do not need to be replaced for this mod to take effect.

mods.name: Lysdexic's Free Beacons
mods.author: TheLysdexicOne
mods.description: Makes beacons free. In my opinion, we should just have a map marker system and forego beacons entirely. Until that is implemented, this is my solution.

mods.name: Lysdexic's Level 250 Cap
mods.author: TheLysdexicOne
mods.description: This mod increases the level cap to 250. Current number of talents required to max talent trees is 599. This mod adjust the talent curve beyond level 50 to give 586 talent points to account for the 13 gained from missions.

mods.name: Lysdexic's Reduce Killcam Time
mods.author: TheLysdexicOne
mods.description: This mod is an attempt to lessen the time spent watching the killcam. Sometimes when a creature falls weirdly, the kill cam can last up to 4.5 seconds before releasing control back to the player. This mod tries to reduce that to 1 second.

mods.name: Lysdexic's Small Pouches - 12
mods.author: TheLysdexicOne
mods.description: This mod increases the number of slots in small pouches from 6 -> 12.

mods.name: Lysdexic's Storage Increase
mods.author: TheLysdexicOne
mods.description: In the building talent tree, there is the talent 'Extra Space'. This talent adds extra storage based on the number of talent points dedicated to it. This mod changes those alteration values from 3->5, 5->10, 8->15, 10->20. This ensures furnaces do not need to be replaced for this mod to take effect.
